hero.name: Anup Kumar Roy
hero.headline: VLSI / STA / Physical Design Enthusiast
hero.summary: Graduate researcher in Electrical and Computer Engineering with interests in radiation effects and reliability in nanoscale CMOS circuits, FPGA-based hardware security systems, static timing analysis, physical design, AI hardware acceleration, and edge computing.

items.title: VLSI Physical Design & Verification Training
items.subtitle: Maven Silicon
items.description: ASIC PD, STA, DRC/LVS, Tcl, Python

sections.title: My Research
paragraphs: My thesis, Impact of Temperature on Radiation-Induced Delays, investigates temperature-dependent soft delay and single event crosstalk delay in 22 nm CMOS technology.
The work also evaluates forward body bias techniques for reliability enhancement using HSPICE simulations.
